landlordNumbers.note: Estimated number of private landlords in the UK. Derived from HMRC property income data.

mortgageWithdrawals.note: Buy-to-let mortgage product withdrawals per month. Peaked in late 2022 as the Bank of England raised rates.

rentalListings.note: Private rental property listings in major UK cities, indexed to 100 in 2020. Source: Zoopla / Rightmove analysis.

sources.name: HMRC
sources.dataset: UK property wealth statistics — rental income

metadata.methodology: Landlord numbers are estimated from HMRC self-assessment property income returns, adjusted for multiple-property landlords. Mortgage product withdrawals are counts of buy-to-let products removed from the market as tracked by Moneyfacts. Rental listings index is based on available-to-rent listings on major portals, indexed to January 2020.
knownIssues: HMRC data lags by approximately 18 months — 2025 figure is estimated
Mortgage product withdrawals reflect lender decisions not landlord exits directly
Rental listings index covers major cities only and may not represent rural markets
